response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, plus strong architectural awareness and open-source contributions — all aligned with the role. However, his title and experience level (Staff/Senior) far exceed the junior/mid-level requirement, and his German language skills are only basic despite high on-site presence in Berlin being required, raising concerns about team integration and client communication.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Active open-source contributions and technical teaching experience
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role; risk of low retention or misaligned expectations
German language proficiency is only basic, but on-site presence in Berlin is mandatory
Extensive use of DLang and niche tools may indicate difficulty prioritizing core stack (Nest.js, PostgreSQL, AWS)
